inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $754.8M minus capital spending $285.9M, divided by 72.7M diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-17)
inputs.dividend_source: Common stock dividends declared $0.86 per share in 2025 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filed owner cash (OCF minus capex). Q1 2026 revenue +21% and $297.6M buybacks signal GLP-1/injectable demand tailwind but base holds filed FY2025 FCF until full-year 2026 confirms run-rate. Asset impairments $11.7M and restructuring $15.0M in FY2025 treated as disclosed one-offs, not added back to base FCF.

bear.notes: Injectable GLP-1 share shifts to oral; customer inventory normalization; elastomer cost inflation; multiple compresses toward large-cap med-tech peers

base.notes: Proprietary Products mid-single-digit organic growth on biologics and injectable obesity therapies; contract manufacturing stable; margin holds on elastomer pricing; buybacks moderate from Q1 2026 pace

bull.notes: GLP-1 and biologics injectable volumes sustain high-teens revenue growth; Dublin and capacity expansions convert; CEO transition smooth; sustained $250M+ quarterly buybacks

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Manufacturing PP&E and intangibles on balance sheet; no land/NAV misstatement pattern (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating packaging and device manufacturer; no resource royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Both segments profitable: Proprietary Products OI $657.2M (26.4% margin), Contract-Manufactured $63.4M (10.9%) FY2025 (10-K segment note)

option_scan.question: Backlog / embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Self-injection devices, SmartDose platform, and GLP-1 component demand embedded in Proprietary Products revenue path; SmartDose 3.5mL rights transferred July 2026 (8-K 2026-07-01)

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No holdco-style private stakes; equity-method income immaterial ($10.5M FY2025)

option_scan.question: Transitory legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder; ongoing dividend and buyback policy

option_scan.question: Product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Drug delivery devices and integrated containment systems already in Proprietary Products sales; modeled via growth not separate terminal (10-K Business)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Validated elastomer stoppers and seals on biologic and injectable vials create recurring component demand; GLP-1 and obesity injectable volumes lift Proprietary Products; contract manufacturing adds fill-finish capacity for large pharma customers
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 MD&A and Business; Q1 2026 10-Q revenue +21% YoY; Proprietary Products +23% Q1

falsifiers.observation: Major customers shift GLP-1 share to oral formulations and injectable component orders decline two consecutive quarters
Customer destocking repeats as in 2023-2024 and organic Proprietary Products growth falls below 3% for four quarters
falsifiers.action: Hold exit multiple at 22x; cap base growth at 4%

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
